name: Magneto AI
description: Governance, security guardrails, and task planning for engineering agents. Requires the magneto-ai CLI installed globally on the gateway host (npm install -g magneto-ai). Intercepts destructive exec/write/edit actions and requires approval before they run.

magnetoCommand.description: Path or name of the magneto CLI binary. Set this if magneto is not on PATH (e.g. /usr/local/bin/magneto). Can also be set via the MAGNETO_COMMAND environment variable. Default: magneto

magnetoCommand.label: Magneto CLI path
magnetoCommand.help: Required: install magneto-ai first — npm install -g magneto-ai. Then set this if the magneto binary is not on your PATH.
